junior-high.label: Junior high curriculum words
junior-high.source: Ministry of Education high school English curriculum standard vocabulary appendix; unstarred entries correspond to compulsory education stage words.

senior-high.label: Senior high curriculum words
senior-high.source: Ministry of Education high school English curriculum standard vocabulary appendix, 2017 edition with 2020 revision.

cet4.label: CET-4 word list
cet4.source: Union of the senior-high curriculum list and the first English entry from each line of mahavivo/english-wordlists CET4_edited.txt.

cet6.label: CET-6 word list
cet6.source: Union of the cumulative CET-4 list and the first English entry from each line of mahavivo/english-wordlists CET6_edited.txt.

toefl.label: TOEFL word list
toefl.source: Union of the senior-high curriculum list and the first English entry from each line of mahavivo/english-wordlists TOEFL.txt.

gre.label: GRE word list
gre.source: Union of the senior-high curriculum list and the first English entry from each line of mahavivo/english-wordlists GRE_8000_Words.txt.

coca-20000.label: COCA 20000 frequency list
coca-20000.source: Extracted first English entry from each line of mahavivo/english-wordlists COCA_20000.txt.
